title: oreogrammitis zeylanica
intro: Oreogrammitis zeylanica, also known as the Ceylonese grass fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. It is native to Sri Lanka and has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Oreogrammitis zeylanica can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
